task_completion.description: Verify the rule name, status, website, and customer groups are configured correctly.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the 'Rule Information' section of the Magento Admin, the 'Rule Name' field contains 'SUMMER_CLEARANCE_2025', the 'Active' toggle is set to 'Yes', 'Main Website' is selected under Websites, and ONLY 'NOT LOGGED IN' and 'General' are selected under Customer Groups.

task_completion.description: Verify the date range and priority are set correctly.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the 'Rule Information' section, the 'From' date is set to '06/01/2025' (or '2025-06-01'), the 'To' date is set to '08/31/2025' (or '2025-08-31'), and the 'Priority' field is set to '2'.

task_completion.description: Verify the rule targets the 'Electronics' category.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the 'Conditions' section, there is a condition specifying that the Category is 'Electronics' (e.g., 'Category is ... Electronics' or 'Category contains Electronics').

task_completion.description: Verify the discount action, amount, and stop processing flag.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the 'Actions' section, 'Apply' is set to 'Apply as percentage of original' (or 'Discount by Percentage of the Original Price'), 'Discount Amount' is set to '20', and 'Discard subsequent rules' (or 'Stop Further Rules Processing') is set to 'Yes'.

task_completion.description: Verify the rule was saved and applied.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A green success message banner appears at the top of the screen stating 'You saved the rule.' and/or 'The rules have been applied.', indicating the agent clicked 'Save and Apply'.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the Magento Admin web interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show a web browser navigating the Magento Admin panel, not a terminal executing API curl commands or scripts.

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with the actual Magento application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The interface should be the standard Magento 2 admin dashboard, not a text editor, code editor, or mocked HTML page.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not use a database client to insert the rule.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should not show phpMyAdmin, MySQL CLI, or any other database management tool being used to directly modify the database tables.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The rule must be named exactly 'SUMMER_CLEARANCE_2025'. The discount amount is 20 with the action 'Apply as percentage of original' (simple_action='by_percent'). The target category is 'Electronics'. The target customer groups are 'NOT LOGGED IN' (ID 0) and 'General' (ID 1) only. The date range is 2025-06-01 to 2025-08-31 (UI may show 06/01/2025 to 08/31/2025). The priority is 2. 'Discard subsequent rules' (stop_rules_processing) must be enabled.
